# XPCArray.IndexValuePair

**Type Alias**

A type that contains an index and the object at that index.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias IndexValuePair = (index: Int, value: xpc_object_t)
```

## Discussion

[doc://com.apple.xpc/documentation/XPC/XPCArray] exposes its values as instances of [doc://com.apple.xpc/documentation/XPC/xpc_object_t] even if they were originally set with other types.
title: XPCArray.IndexValuePair
